user.title: Create an aggregate Stremio library
user.description: Configure the stream-server and providers. Spanish/Latin Audio filters the main stream providers; Sports remains an optional separate provider.

data_description.catalog_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Cinemeta is preloaded.
data_description.stream_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Torrentio is preloaded and also supplies the Spanish/Latin Audio profile.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: OpenSubtitles v3 is preloaded; leave empty to disable.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: Legacy compatibility field. Leave it empty; Spanish/Latin Audio filters release names from the main stream providers.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: StremVerse is preloaded for F1 and sports. Its outages do not block movies and series.
data_description.default_media_player: Chromecast, Android TV or another media_player entity

data.play_ideal_on_select: Play ideal link when selecting an item
data.cast_reset_before_play: Fully close Cast receiver before playback
data.playback_start_timeout: Seconds allowed for each source to start
data.failure_notify_ha: Notify in Home Assistant after all sources fail

data_description.stream_manifest_urls: Main providers for normal playback and the keyword-filtered Spanish/Latin Audio profile.
data_description.secondary_stream_manifest_url: Optional manifest.json for a second main stream provider. Results are merged and deduplicated with the primary providers; failures do not block them.
data_description.latin_manifest_urls: No longer used. Clear this field; saved legacy values are ignored and never contacted.
data_description.sports_manifest_urls: StremVerse is preloaded for F1/sports. A temporary failure does not block the rest of the integration.
data_description.subtitle_manifest_urls: One URL per line. Leave empty to disable.
data_description.account_enabled: Adds My Stremio Library, Continue Watching, resume and progress synchronization. Playback still uses this bridge's existing ranking, fallback and stream-server pipeline.
data_description.account_email: Used with the password only to obtain a Stremio auth key.
data_description.account_password: Used only when saving to exchange it for an auth key; it is never stored. Leave blank later to keep the existing login.
data_description.account_provider_mode: manual uses only configured manifests; account uses the account add-ons for catalog, streams and subtitles; hybrid merges both and removes duplicates. Sports remains separately configured.
data_description.latin_audio_keywords: Comma, semicolon or line separated markers checked in stream name, title, description and behaviorHints.filename. Matching ignores accents and punctuation.
data_description.hide_non_latin_items: Checks streams before showing Spanish/Latin catalog cards and caches the result for 30 minutes. Series use representative episodes. Temporary provider errors keep the card visible.
data_description.preferred_audio_languages: Ordered codes used by compatible GPU stream-server builds for multi-track files. Default: lat, esp, spa, es. If no track matches, the file's original default is used.
data_description.play_ideal_on_select: Enabled by default. Movies, episodes and events play directly without opening the source list.
data_description.ideal_link_filter: Applies hard size and keyword filters, then direct-play compatibility and torrent health before quality, codec and size tie-breakers.
data_description.prefer_h264: Optional. Prefer names advertising H.264, H264, x264 or AVC. Recommended for direct playback.
data_description.prefer_smaller_size: Optional. Uses file size only as the final tie-breaker; the maximum-size setting is always enforced independently.
data_description.min_torrent_seeders: Default 5. Within each compatibility tier, torrents below this value are skipped when at least one torrent reaches it. If every torrent is weak, the best available ones remain as fallbacks. Set 0 to disable.
data_description.low_power_stream_server: Enable for stream-server-home-assistant on Raspberry Pi or another host without usable transcoding hardware. It forces direct playback and overrides Force transcode without changing the saved audio option.
data_description.audio_mode: Direct preserves the original stream. Automatic is a direct-playback alias. Force transcode requests conversion only when low-power stream-server mode is disabled.
data_description.max_size_gb: Hard filter for automatic selection. Sources with a known size above this value are never used; 0 disables the limit.
data_description.exclude_keywords: Comma separated, for example CAM, TS, HDCAM.
data_description.subtitle_mode: Automatic loads the first preferred language on Google Cast.
data_description.subtitle_languages: ISO codes in priority order, for example spa, eng.
data_description.subtitle_convert_vtt: Downloads, converts and serves WebVTT from Home Assistant.
data_description.subtitle_base_url: Recommended LAN URL reachable by Chromecast: {recommended_subtitle_base_url}
data_description.cast_compatibility_filter: Prefers direct-play-compatible formats and keeps incompatible formats in lower fallback tiers unless strict filtering removes them.
data_description.stop_before_play: Enabled by default. Sends media_stop to the selected player, waits for the previous stream reader to close, then prebuffers the new source.
data_description.cast_reset_before_play: For Cast entities, sends media_stop and turn_off, waits for the receiver app to close, then starts a clean session. It does not power off the television.
data_description.fallback_enabled: Ranks the best sources and automatically tries the next one when the player does not reach playing state.
data_description.fallback_source_count: Default 5. Sources are ordered using compatibility, seed health and the enabled preferences.
data_description.playback_start_timeout: How long each source may remain loading before the next ranked source is attempted.
data_description.failure_notify_ha: Creates a persistent Home Assistant notification with the title, attempted source count and cover image.
data_description.tvoverlay_enabled: Also sends the final failure to TvOverlay when a service is configured.
data_description.tvoverlay_target: Optional. For tvoverlay_ui enter its stable device identifier. Also accepts device:, entity:, area:, target:, or host: prefixes.
data_description.tvoverlay_duration: How many seconds the failure overlay remains visible.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the main stream-server. Check its IP address and port 11470.
error.invalid_config: The core configuration is invalid. Check the catalog and main stream URLs.
error.account_auth_failed: Could not authenticate the Stremio account. Check the email/password or enter a new password to renew the saved auth key.
